Uses of Interface
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.Strategy

Packages that use Strategy
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof
This package contains the core data structures of proofs, nodes, goals, as well as machinery to deal with these data structures.
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
This package contains classes implementing the proof search strategies of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen.macros
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd.macro

    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro.RemovePostStrategy
    This strategy accepts all rule apps for which the rule name starts with a string in the admitted set and rejects everything else.
    protected class 
    UseInformationFlowContractMacro.PropExpansionStrategy
    This strategy accepts all rule apps for which the rule name starts with a string in the admitted set and rejects everything else.

  • Uses of Strategy in de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

    Subinterfaces of Strategy in de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ComponentStrategy
     
    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy that implement Strategy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractFeatureStrategy
     
    class 
    FIFOStrategy
    Trivial implementation of the Strategy interface that uses only the goal time to determine the cost of a RuleApp.
    class 
    FOLStrategy
    Strategy for general FOL rules.
    class 
    IntegerStrategy
    This strategy implements reasoning for integer arithmetics.
    class 
    JavaCardDLStrategy
    This strategy is the catch-all for Java related features that are either cross-cutting or one of the features that do not fit well into any other strategy.
    class 
    JFOLStrategy
    This strategy extends the classical FOLStrategy with heuristics for quantifier instantiation based on E-matching, which involves normalization of quantified formulas, as well as term features depending on integer theory.
    class 
    ModularJavaDLStrategy
    Combines a list of component strategies ComponentStrategy into a unified strategy.
    class 
    SimpleFilteredStrategy
    Trivial implementation of the Strategy interface that uses only the goal time to determine the cost of a RuleApp.
    class 
    StringStrategy
    Strategy for string related rules.
    class 
    SymExStrategy
    Strategy for symbolic execution rules.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    FIFOStrategy.INSTANCE
